indicators.name: white high-top tables
indicators.rationale: High-top tables are not suitable for extended computer work as they do not provide a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: white bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not ergonomic for extended periods and do not provide a comfortable seating position for computer work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or seating options are present that would be suitable for extended computer work.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is open and lacks a dedicated area for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of high-top tables and bar stools suggests it is designed for social activities rather than work. There is no flat surface or ergonomic seating available, making it difficult to set up a proper workstation. The layout is open and lacks a dedicated workspace, further undermining its suitability for solo computer work.
